MINI MINUTES: 09:30am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Haigang Group,Inc. D.B.A. California Technology College and Frank Tu, appear through Frank Tu. Respondent Mandy Wong, appears in Pro Per. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Newman.
Appellant presents the Court with a Motion for Continuance. The motion is denied.
No Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
